description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine cctswsomod_status_2, and is implemented by a call to cctswsomod_status_2. Use this API to change status of an “other” type model attached to a switched shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.8.0. ierr = cctswsomod_status(ibus, model, status)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Switched shunt bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the model whose status is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no bus other model at this bus.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
